name: Spanish
tagline: Learn the Spanish you actually need - for where you are going.

goals.title: Visiting Spain
goals.summary: Survive and connect on a trip - greetings, numbers, eating out, getting around and shopping.

goals.title: Living in Spain
goals.summary: Settle in - paperwork, the doctor, renting, and everyday neighbourhood life.

goals.title: Business Spanish
goals.summary: Meetings, email, introductions and negotiating in a professional setting.
